modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy with patchy morning fog. Light winds. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Daytime maximum around 20°C.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Firepit Safety
modules.summary: Fire danger is Moderate. Firepits and campfires are permitted today with mandatory safety precautions. Currently within the Restricted Burning Period (Autumn) which ends 3 May 2026; a Permit to Burn is required for any burning activities.
bullet_points: 3-meter clearance of all flammable material required
Adult must be in attendance at all times
Reliable water supply must be on hand
Permit to Burn required during Restricted Burning Period

modules.title: Waste Collection Schedule
modules.summary: Weekly FOGO (Green) bin collection applies every week. Fortnightly alternation between Recyclables (Yellow) and Landfill (Red) bins based on anchor date 30 June 2025.
bullet_points: Recyclables (Yellow) and Landfill (Red) bins: alternate weekly
Calculation: If weeks elapsed since 30 June 2025 is even, it is a Recyclables week; if odd, it is a Landfill week
